patch.value: Promote history-stream maintenance primitives to the public SDK: history-redact, history-repair, history-compact (audited rewrite, re-anchor, checkpoint/prune)

The existing promotion set (pm-98cz lifecycle, pm-rjqr reads, pm-zwpp facets, pm-oxrw governance, pm-3mna workspace config) leaves the history MUTATION family uncovered: history-redact (audited redaction), history-repair (chain re-anchor after drift), history-compact (checkpoint/prune preserving replay integrity), all built on the shared history-rewrite orchestration (dedup'd in closed pm-bzgt). SDK-first requires these as public typed primitives so the consolidated pm history subcommands (pm-tqel) become thin shims and integrators can run stream maintenance programmatically. Duplicate check: pm-tqel is the CLI-grammar counterpart; pm-xk39/pm-bzgt closed history; no open SDK-promotion overlap.

SDK exports typed redact/repair/compact primitives preserving audited-rewrite guarantees (hash chain continuity, replay integrity, checkpoint markers, redaction audit trail) and returning the same structured results the CLI prints; CLI history maintenance commands consume only these primitives; docstrings + linked tests + SDK reference docs; zero behavior change (history rewrite/compact/redact specs green).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text:
Promotion slicing S1-S4 (pass #53 code survey). Territory = history-redact.ts 783 + history-compact.ts 759 + history-repair.ts 428 lines; ALL domain logic (rule parsing, rewrite, replay, re-anchor, rollback) lives in CLI command files; SDK exports none of it. Blockers pm-lodl/pm-muhw closed - actionable now.
Duplication evidence: applyHistoryPatch is implemented TWICE (history-redact.ts:313 and history-compact.ts:169) inside command files while core/history/replay.ts exists - promotion consolidates into one kernel.
S1 redaction engine (~90m): move buildRedactionRules / applyLiteralRule / applyRegexRule / redactUnknownValue / rewriteHistoryEntries / inspectHistoryIntegrity + apply/rollback into core/history/redaction.ts; SDK exports redactHistory() returning the audit-trail result (rules applied, replacement counts, integrity snapshot).
S2 repair primitive (~45m): history-repair.ts (428 lines, 6 fns) becomes repairHistory() re-anchor primitive taking a drift report from scanHistoryDrift.
S3 compact primitive (~75m): parseBeforeBoundary / replayHistoryAndResolveCheckpoint / reanchorRetainedEntries / apply-rewrite become compactHistory() checkpoint/prune primitive; core/history/history-compact-bulk.ts is already core-side - align with it.
S4 shared integrity kernel (~60m): one replay + hash-chain verification module consumed by all three primitives AND by the immutability consumers pm-3z0k (attestation) and pm-hib1 (get --at) - same kernel, multiple call sites; replay-integrity spec matrix + SDK reference docs.
Recommended entry: S1 (largest file, fully self-contained pure functions); fold the kernel extraction into whichever of S1/S3 lands first.
